Account Settings
Build AI Voice Assistant Mobile App MVP
Posted 6 minutes ago
Worldwide

Summary
We are looking for AI Developer to build a simple MVP of an AI-powered mobile assistant.

The application should support both chat and voice interactions, allowing users to ask questions and receive intelligent responses based on a custom knowledge base.

What we need:
• Integrate OpenAI API
• Implement AI chat functionality
• Add voice input and voice responses
• Build a basic RAG knowledge base
• Connect required APIs
• Configure simple automation workflows using n8n

$150.00

Fixed-price
Entry level
I am looking for freelancers with the lowest rates
Project Type:One-time project
Skills and Expertise
Mandatory skills
Mobile App Development Consultation
AI Agent Development
AI Assistants
OpenAI API
RAG
n8n
API Integrations
Voice AI experience (Vapi, ElevenLabs, Retell AI)
